values.content:
=You work at Dimension Seven Systems. You're responsible for categorising inbound emails as sales emails or not. 

To do this you must read through the thread of that email (previous emails) and identify whether the email is considered a sales email or not. 

Sales emails are emails that should be handled by the sales department of Dimension Seven Systems. They will be from potential customers regarding Dimension Seven Systems's services. 

Dimension Seven Systems runs cold email campaigns, so these emails may be replies to the cold emails sent by the sales team. 

Your output must follow this format: 

{
"decision": "Sales OR Not Sales"
}

If the email is not a sales email, then you the value of the decision parameter must be 'Not Sales'. If it is a sales email, then it should be 'Sales'.

Don't output anything else. 

Don't wrap the outout in ```json```. 

We just received a new email. 

Here's the entire thread of the email in JSON String formatting. 

{{ $json.emails.toJsonString() }}

The newest email is the one just received, which would be closest to right now - {{ $now.toISO() }}

(keep in mind each email has the previous email below it)

parameters.timeMin: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('After', `the day before the date the user requested`, 'string') }}
parameters.timeMax: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('Before', `the day after the date the user requested`, 'string') }}

parameters.name: kamexa_information
parameters.description: Information about Kamexa that you can use to answer sales queries.

parameters.text:
=You're an inbox manager. A new email was received in your inbox. 

The emails are given to you in JSON String formatting. 

Your job is to reformat this for your manager. 

You must: 

1. Identify the newest email which was just recived and extract this email. This email will be dated today {{ $now }} and will be the last email in the thread. The email generally has the previous email at the end of it so you must decide when it is referencing a previous email and remove that so the final output is just the new email body. Put this in the newPorspectEmail parameter of your output.  

2. Summarise the previous emails in the thread in dotpoint format so your manager can quickly read over it for context. Put this in the previousEmails parameter. 

Sometimes the email thread will not contain any previous emails. In this case then just leave the previousEmails parameter empty.

Here's the email thread in JSON String: 

{{ $json.emails.toJsonString() }}

Keep in mind the thread goes from oldest email at top to newest email at the bottom.

messageValues.message:
=You're a sales inbox manager. 

The emails that come in from clients are either to book a call or to get more info. 

Your job is to classify each email as a calendar or information email. 

Calendar emails are those where the prospect suggests being booked in for a call. 

Information emails are those which require a reply from the sales team to progress further. This could be the prospect asking for information or making an enquiry.

parameters.content: # Check Google Drive + Response Email Draft

## Cold Email Best Practices
**Is NOT to send sequences in same thread. "That's just three reminders that I didn't want to respond to you."** 
**So, IF the actual back and forth between all the outbound messages and the inbound responses is important later, we will need to do something different to grab all the messages. Probably by getting the leads email address and searching by that.**
## Right Now I Have No Idea Why all this is necessary.

emails.message:
Hey {{first_name}},

This’ll sound strange, but I built something that fixes a problem you
probably forgot you're still dealing with.

It's called [insert product name or keep it vague], and it handles [insert
painful task/frustrating process] for you. No more [insert annoying
outcome], no more babysitting.

No pitch, just curious — want to see what it looks like?

– Anna
[One-liner about what it does or your credibility]
P.S. Happy to send a quick 2-minute video.

-- 
Thanks,

Ann Sinclair
Client Success Manager


www.duileadlab.com

Hey {{first_name}},

Here’s that 2-min demo I mentioned.
👉 [Link to demo, Loom, screenshot, whatever.]

It basically does all the boring/repetitive shit so you don’t have to. If
you ever feel like your [process/team/inbox/sanity] is on fire, this fixes
it.

Let me know if you want to kick the tires — or just reply “interested” and
I’ll send you the next step.

– ANNA

Totally fine if now’s not the time — just figured I’d check in one last

If you ever get tired of [insert pain point again], this thing’s still

output.previousEmails:
- Ann Sinclair introduced a product designed to fix a persistent pain point, offering to show a 2-minute video demonstration with no pitch.
- Followed up with a 2-minute demo link, emphasizing how the product automates boring and repetitive tasks to reduce stress and improve process management.
- Sent a last check-in email offering an easy way to get started, positioning the product as a quiet solution running in the background for those tired of busywork.
